boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: grant budget revision within approved reallocation cap. Boundary: budget email cannot change restricted categories alone.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the exact boundary.

critical_features_preserved: budget cap, category, and program officer approval match
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact execution boundary. The control record flags missing or mismatched budget cap, category, and program officer approval match. Policy requires exact current-source closure before action. Tone, urgency, or operational convenience do not authorize execution, so the proper disposition is escalate.
